svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="remotekind-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="600" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="860" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="browser" value="Visitor's browser" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef2f7;strokeColor=#6b7280;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="340" y="30" width="180" height="46" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="netlify" value="Netlify — static site (CDN)
Home · How It Works · About · Contact
prerendered static HTML" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="150" width="320" height="110" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="api" value="/api/contact
serverless · prerender=false
(the only server code)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#1e40af;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="330" y="360" width="210" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="calendly" value="Calendly
booking (external)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="650" y="160" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="postmark" value="Postmark
transactional email (external)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="650" y="365" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="Secret POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN lives server-side only (no PUBLIC_ prefix) — never shipped to the browser." style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#6b7280;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="470" width="600" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" value="loads pages" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" target="netlify"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" value="Book a call (client-side embed)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" target="calendly"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" value="submits contact form (POST)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" target="api"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" value="sends 2 emails: notify + confirm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" target="postmark"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
svg.text: Home · How It Works · About · Contact
Secret POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN stays server-side only (no PUBLIC_ prefix) — never shipped to the browser.
